title: gagea persica var. kashmirensis
intro: Gagea persica var. kashmirensis, also known as Kashmir Gagea or Kashmir Gagea bulb, is a medicinal plant species belonging to the Liliaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to possess health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, including bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, Gagea persica var. kashmirensis is prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine systems.
